objective: Implement V2.6 document-driven end-to-end dry-run CLI
tests_run: python -c "import json, pathlib; [print('OK ' + str(p)) for p in pathlib.Path('specs').glob('*.json') if json.loads(p.read_text(encoding='utf-8')) is not None]"
done_criteria: A single CLI command runs the document-driven dry-run pipeline
The report includes ProjectBrief, ContextBundle, TaskGraph, worker packages, RuntimeState, and final status
The generated runtime reaches DONE in deterministic dry-run mode
Relevant tests and contract checks pass
